behaviors.reasoning: Transitive dependency resolution requires the real manifest parser wired to the dependency resolver — testing the extraction chain.
Version range matching requires the query builder wired to a mock/real CVE database with known version data.
Sorting by severity then CVSS is a pure comparison function on a list of CVE objects.
Manifest modification requires the real parser + writer wired together to verify only one entry changes in the actual file.
Creating a real PR on a real repository requires the GitHub API — testing the full git+API chain.
Semver major version comparison is a pure function: input two version strings, output breaking/non-breaking.
Verifying PR creation is skipped AND a review flag is surfaced requires the scanner wired to the real output/reporting system — testing the branch in the full pipeline.
